entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `fact` TEXT NOT NULL, `tags` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]', `time` TEXT, `session_id` TEXT, `created_at` TEXT NOT NULL, `importance` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0)

indices.name: idx_facts_time
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_facts_time` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`time`)

indices.name: idx_facts_session
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_facts_session` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`session_id`)

indices.name: idx_facts_importance
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_facts_importance` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`importance`)

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
